description_long: This is a red aluminum can featuring the iconic Coca-Cola branding in bold white script, accented by dynamic white and yellow wave graphics. The can is cylindrical with a slightly tapered top and bottom, and displays realistic water droplets on its surface, suggesting it is cold and refreshing. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism. Nutritional information, barcodes, and product details are printed in white on the back, while the front and sides are dominated by the large Coca-Cola logo. The can's surface is glossy and reflective, with a hard, smooth texture typical of beverage cans. This object is commonly found in urban environments such as vending machines, convenience stores, and public spaces.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with bold white branding, metallic top, and detailed product labeling. The surface features water droplets and dynamic wave graphics.
description_view_0: The can's side shows the Coca-Cola logo, nutritional information, barcode, and product details, with visible water droplets and wave graphics.
description_view_1: This view highlights the back of the can, focusing on the nutritional label, barcode, and a partial Coca-Cola logo.
description_view_2: The can's side displays the sweeping white and yellow wave graphics with a partial Coca-Cola logo, minimal text visible.
description_view_3: The front view prominently features the full Coca-Cola logo in white script against the red background, with wave graphics and water droplets.
attribute_brand_logo: The Coca-Cola logo is prominently displayed in white cursive script on the front and sides of the can, occupying a large portion of the red surface.
attribute_flavor_indication: The red color and Coca-Cola branding indicate the classic flavor; no additional flavor cues are present.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back of the can in white text.
